overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a Hunter character exploring a dark gothic city with Victorian architecture under a purple night sky. The character walks through courtyards, along canals, and up grand staircases toward a massive cathedral, showcasing the game's atmospheric horror environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic courtyard with large gated entrance

events.description: character approaches and passes through the metal gate doorway into the building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through a large metal gate doorway with intricate lattice design

entered.detail: large stone archway with pointed gothic design and metal gates
tall metal gates with diamond lattice pattern that open as the character approaches
dark stone walls with gothic architectural details and tall windows
dark purple and pink cloudy sky visible above the courtyard
broken wooden planks and debris stacked against the wall
stack of red wooden crates near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dark cobblestone courtyard approaching a massive gothic archway with metal gates. The purple night sky looms overhead as the character walks forward and passes through the opening gates into the doorway.

events.description: exits the doorway into open air revealing a canal and stone bridge
character stops briefly at the canal edge to look down into the water

agents.ego_description: walking along a canal walkway and pausing to look down into the dark water below

entered.detail: dark water canal running alongside the path with mist rising from surface
stone bridge crossing the canal in the distance
ornate black metal railing along the canal edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the doorway, the scene opens to a canal walkway under the purple night sky. The character walks along the cobblestone path beside dark water, pausing briefly to look down into the misty canal before continuing toward a distant stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to gothic cathedral plaza

events.description: passes through stone archway revealing massive cathedral vista with purple sky
begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the cathedral

agents.ego_description: walking up a massive stone staircase toward a towering gothic cathedral, passing bodies lying on the steps

entered.detail: massive gothic cathedral with multiple spires and towers dominating the skyline
wide stone stairs with worn steps leading upward to the plaza
ornate stone archway frame that the character passes through
decorative stone balustrades lining both sides of the staircase
corpses lying on the stairs adding to the horror atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the view opens to a breathtaking vista of a massive gothic cathedral against the purple sky. The character ascends a grand stone staircase lined with ornate railings, stepping past fallen bodies while the towering cathedral grows larger with each step.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cathedral plaza with statues and gothic architecture

events.description: reaches top of stairs and continues walking through the plaza
turns right toward a narrow passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza area toward the cathedral entrance, passing statues and ornate buildings

entered.detail: open stone-paved area at the top of the stairs with decorative pavement
large stone statues flanking the path leading to the cathedral
gothic-style street lamps with warm glowing lights
main entrance to the cathedral with stairs and archways

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters a vast plaza dominated by the looming cathedral. Gothic statues and ornate lamp posts line the path as the character walks toward the cathedral entrance, the massive spires filling the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between gothic buildings with stairs

events.description: turns away from the cathedral into a narrow darker passage between buildings
ascends stairs through the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow passage and ascending stairs between tall gothic buildings, moving away from the cathedral

entered.detail: confined walkway between tall stone buildings with overhanging upper floors
metal gate structure at the top of the stairs in the passage
tall gothic buildings with balconies and windows leaning over the path

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the cathedral, the character enters a narrow, darker passage between tall buildings. The sky disappears overhead as the character ascends stone stairs through the confined space, passing under a metal gate archway into the deeper parts of the gothic city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a secluded gothic courtyard through an expansive cathedral plaza and back into the claustrophobic depths of a dark city. It begins with the character passing through metal gates in a cobblestone courtyard under a purple night sky, moving forward into a doorway that opens onto a misty canal walkway. As the character follows the path beside the dark water, the scene expands through a stone archway to reveal a breathtaking vista of a massive gothic cathedral. The camera then ascends a grand stone staircase lined with ornate railings and fallen bodies, emerging into a vast plaza dominated by towering spires and gothic statues. Finally, the view shifts away from the cathedral as the character enters a narrow, dark passage between tall buildings, ascending further stone stairs under a metal gate archway into the city's confined interior.
